title: Glymir Coverage Report — snapshot
description: Auto-generated coverage report from UCIS snapshots.

assertions.name: AST_01
assertions.intent: After reset deassertion, valid_out one cycle later equals the prior-cycle valid_in (registered handshake with one-cycle latency).

assertions.name: AST_02
assertions.intent: When valid_in is high this cycle, result on the next cycle equals the reference model's combinational output o_a_op_b sampled this cycle.

assertions.name: AST_03
assertions.intent: While valid_in is low, result is stable (holds its prior value).

assertions.name: AST_04
assertions.intent: While resetn is asserted (low), valid_out is 1'b0.

assertions.name: AST_05
assertions.intent: While resetn is asserted (low), result is 8'h00.

assertions.name: AST_06
assertions.intent: Scoreboard: every valid_in cycle, the testbench captures (op,a,b) and the predicted ref_alu.o_a_op_b, then on the next cycle compares the captured prediction against result; mismatches fail the test.
